title: RECODE-H: A Benchmark for Research Code Development with Interactive Human Feedback
reason_to_include: ICLR 2026 conference benchmark: 102 paper/repository tasks with executable unit tests and interactive-feedback protocol；结果由 Repository unit tests decide executable research-code task completion 判定。
decision_reason: 主来源、发布日期与程序化验证契约均已在候选审计中核对。
review_note: L4 内容已完成，仍等待人工 L5 决策。
